page.title: Skill Launchpad
page.subtitle: Launch Skill Tokens on BNB Chain via Flap Protocol & four.meme Protocol. Build sustainable economics for your AI Skills.

steps.submitSkillDesc: Upload your AI Agent Skill to the marketplace.
steps.createTokenDesc: Launch a BEP-20 token via Flap Protocol on BNB Chain.
steps.deployOnChainDesc: Token is deployed via CREATE2 with deterministic address.
steps.tradeEarnDesc: Token is live on PancakeSwap. Build your Skill economy.

create.title: Launch Token
create.subtitle: Create a BEP-20 token for your AI Skill via Flap Protocol

tokenInfo.heading: Token Information
tokenInfo.name: Token Name
tokenInfo.descPlaceholder: Describe your token and its utility...
tokenInfo.invalidWebsite: Website must be a valid URL (http/https) and under 150 characters
tokenInfo.invalidTwitter: Twitter must start with https://twitter.com or https://x.com and be under 200 characters
tokenInfo.invalidTelegram: Telegram must start with https://t.me or https://telegram.org and be under 200 characters

selectSkill.heading: Select a Skill *
selectSkill.desc: Each token must be linked to an AI Skill. Choose the skill this token will represent.
selectSkill.ownSkill: You own this skill — launch directly
selectSkill.verifiedAuthor: You are the verified author — launch directly
selectSkill.approved: Your request was approved — you can launch
selectSkill.hasToken: This skill already has an active token.

review.computingAddress: Computing vanity address (may take a few seconds)...

success.title: Token Deployed!
success.message: Your token ${{symbol}} has been deployed on {{chain}}.

toast.walletMismatch: Please switch to your bound wallet address {{address}}

fee.title: Transaction Fee
fee.summary: Protocol fees are automatically distributed to Skill creator rewards, AI skill incentive pool and SafuSkill ecosystem fund. The rate is permanently locked by smart contract.
fee.desc: Each trade incurs a 1% protocol fee, distributed as follows:
fee.locked: This ratio is permanently locked by smart contract and cannot be unilaterally modified.

initialBuy.title: How much {{symbol}} to buy?
initialBuy.desc: Buying a small amount helps protect your token from sniper attacks (max supply is 1 billion). You can buy up to 800 million {{symbol}} tokens. If you pay more than needed, the difference will be refunded.

platform.heading: Launch Platform
platform.flapDesc: Launch via flap.sh on BNB Chain. Bonding curve pricing, raise target 16 BNB.
platform.fourmemeDesc: Launch via four.meme on BNB Chain. Bonding curve pricing, raise target 24 BNB.

detail.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!
detail.authorVerificationDesc: Are you the author of this skill? Verify your GitHub repo access to claim it.
detail.youAreAuthorDesc: You uploaded this skill. Claim authorship to set your beneficiary wallet and receive revenue.
detail.noGithubRepo: No GitHub repo linked to this skill
detail.zipAuthorOnly: Only the skill uploader can claim authorship for ZIP-uploaded skills.
detail.zipClaimDesc: If you are the author of this skill, you can submit a claim application.
detail.disputePendingDesc: Your application has been submitted and is being reviewed. Please wait patiently. To avoid duplicate processing, please do not submit again.
detail.disputeApproved: Your claim application has been approved
detail.disputeRejected: Your claim application has been rejected. You may resubmit.
detail.onlyAuthorCanVerify: Only the original GitHub repository author can verify this skill.
detail.disputeClaim: Think you're the author? Submit a claim
detail.listedOnDex: This token has graduated to DEX! Trade on:

fourmeme.graduated: This token has graduated to PancakeSwap.
